name: TestResetEnvVarValue
title: TestResetEnvVarValue
description: Resets the environment variable to initial value. If no initial value is available, the environment variable is set to 0 or "".

parameters.name: aEnvVar
parameters.description: Environment variable that should be reset.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
